summary: Frontend testing for Hotel PMS: Night Audit Dashboard, ReservationCalendar refactoring, NightAuditLogs hook fix, and AdminTenants hook fix. All tested features are working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - minor accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: ReservationDetailModal doesn't have role='dialog' attribute but renders correctly - the fixed backdrop/overlay pattern works well
Console warnings about missing Description in Dialog components could be addressed for better accessibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features tested are working correctly.

ui_elements_verified: Page title: Gece Denetimi (Night Audit) with data-testid='night-audit-title'
Stats cards: Toplam Denetim, Son Oda Geliri, Son No-Show
Empty history message when no audits exist

reservation_calendar_refactored.refactoring_verified: ReservationCalendar.js refactored from ~2936 lines to ~800 lines with sub-components in /calendar/ folder
sub_components: CalendarHeader.js - Navigation, date range, sync button, add reservation
CalendarGrid.js - Room rows, booking bars, drag/drop cells
ui_elements_verified: Legend (data-testid='calendar-legend') showing Expedia, Tatilbudur, Booking.com, Kesin colors
Room types grouping: Suite, Deluxe, Superior, Standard, Family, Junior Suite
Date headers with Turkish day names (Paz, Pts, Sal, Car, Per, Cum, Cts)
interactions_verified: Click empty cell -> Quick Booking dialog opens with room, guest, dates, amount fields
Double-click booking bar -> ReservationDetailModal opens with tabs (Genel Bilgiler, Misafirler, Folyolar, etc)
Days selector changes visible days count

ui_elements_verified: Filter section with date range and status
night_audit_logs.hook_violation_fix: useTranslation hook now called inside component - no hook violation errors

admin_tenants.notes: Page requires super_admin role. demo@hotel.com has admin role so redirected to dashboard. Hook violation fix verified - useTranslation called inside component.

navigation_verification.night_audit_nav: Gece Denetimi link visible in sidebar navigation

console_warnings: Warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - appears when dialogs open
